summary: Completed re-testing Warehouse Fase B after 3 regression fixes. All fixes verified successful: (1) Login as warehouse user works without crash, (2) Structure editing (add/edit zone/rack/level/bin) works without crash, (3) Warehouse user can save structure and perform putaway (permission fix verified). Backend APIs 100% functional (9/9 tests passed). Frontend fully functional with all features working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: Login as warehouse user (200)
✅ Backend: Login as admin user (200)
✅ Backend: GET /api/warehouses/wh_jakarta/locations - returns Zone→Rack→Level→Bin structure with bins, capacity, occupancy
✅ Backend: PUT /api/warehouses/wh_jakarta/structure - successfully saved test zone with racks/levels/bins
✅ Backend: Verify structure persistence - test zone found after re-GET
✅ Backend: GET /api/inventory/putaway/queue - returns rolls waiting for bin assignment
✅ Backend: POST /api/inventory/putaway - successfully assigned roll to bin (queue decreased)
✅ Backend: GET /api/purchase-requisitions/reorder-suggestions - returns velocity-based ROP suggestions
✅ Backend: SSOT regression check - putaway only updates roll.bin_id, does not modify inventory_balances
✅ REGRESSION FIX 1: Login as warehouse user - NO crash, no red error overlay, page loads correctly
✅ REGRESSION FIX 2: Structure editing - Added zone 'Test Zone Regression', added rack/level/bin, edited bin code and capacity - NO crash, no 'Cannot read properties of undefined' errors
✅ REGRESSION FIX 3: Warehouse user can save structure - Permission fix verified, warehouse user successfully performed putaway (queue: 19→18 rolls)
✅ Frontend: LocationPutawayView component loads successfully
✅ Frontend: Navigation to 'Lokasi & Putaway' menu works
✅ Frontend: Structure tab displays zones/racks/levels/bins correctly
✅ Frontend: 'Tambah Zone' button works, zone name input works
✅ Frontend: Add Rack/Level/Bin buttons work
✅ Frontend: Edit bin code and capacity inputs work
✅ Frontend: 'Simpan Struktur' button works (bin count increased from 10 to 11, capacity from 3,800m to 4,600m)
✅ Frontend: Putaway tab displays correctly
✅ Frontend: 'Okupansi Bin' section shows bins with utilization bars
✅ Frontend: 'Antrean Putaway' section shows rolls in queue
✅ Frontend: Bin selector dropdown works
✅ Frontend: 'Tempatkan' button works - roll assigned to bin successfully
✅ Frontend: KPI stats display correctly (Total Bin: 11, Kapasitas: 4,600m, Terisi: 200m, Belum Ditempatkan: 18 roll)
✅ Frontend: No JavaScript errors in console (only external analytics script failures)

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all regression fixes verified, all features working)

regression_fix_1_frontend_crash.description: Previously WarehouseStructure.jsx crashed with 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading code)' when warehouse had Zone→Rack→Level→Bin schema
regression_fix_1_frontend_crash.fix_applied: WarehouseStructure.jsx now flattens bins supporting both legacy rack.bins and new rack.levels[].bins with null guards + empty-state
regression_fix_1_frontend_crash.verification: Login as warehouse user lands without any red error overlay. Default 'Stok & ATP' inventory view and 'Struktur Gudang' section render fine. Navigation to 'Lokasi & Putaway' works without crash.

regression_fix_2_structure_edit_crash.description: Previously editing zone/rack names in LocationPutawayView crashed
regression_fix_2_structure_edit_crash.fix_applied: LocationPutawayView.jsx zone/rack/level/bin inputs now use clean update() onChange pattern (removed broken setField). normalizeZones function handles both schemas with defensive null checks (|| '' and || [])
regression_fix_2_structure_edit_crash.verification: Successfully added zone 'Test Zone Regression', added rack/level/bin, edited bin code to 'TEST-BIN-REG' and capacity to 800 - NO crash. All structure editing operations work smoothly.

regression_fix_3_permission.description: Previously warehouse role got 403 on PUT /api/warehouses/{id}/structure and POST /api/inventory/putaway
regression_fix_3_permission.fix_applied: permissions_config.py line 87: warehouse role now has 'warehouse': ['view', 'create', 'update']
regression_fix_3_permission.verification: Warehouse user successfully saved structure (bin count increased from 10 to 11, capacity from 3,800m to 4,600m). Warehouse user successfully performed putaway action (roll assigned to bin A1-01, queue decreased from 19 to 18 rolls). No 403 or permission errors.

backend_api_status.authentication: ✅ Working - both warehouse and admin users can login
backend_api_status.location_crud: ✅ Working - GET locations returns proper Zone→Rack→Level→Bin structure, PUT structure saves successfully and persists
backend_api_status.putaway_operations: ✅ Working - queue endpoint returns unassigned rolls, putaway action assigns rolls to bins, queue count decreases
backend_api_status.reorder_suggestions: ✅ Working - returns velocity-based ROP suggestions with avg_daily_sold, suggested_rop, lead_time, preferred_supplier
backend_api_status.ssot_compliance: ✅ Verified - putaway is roll-based, only updates roll.bin_id, does not directly modify inventory_balances

frontend_status.structure_tab: ✅ Working - displays zones/racks/levels/bins, add/edit operations work
frontend_status.putaway_tab: ✅ Working - displays bin occupancy grid and putaway queue, putaway action works
frontend_status.kpi_stats: ✅ Working - all stats display correctly (Total Bin, Kapasitas, Terisi, Belum Ditempatkan)
frontend_status.ui_interactions: ✅ Working - all buttons, inputs, dropdowns, tabs work correctly

console_errors.external_failures: Only external analytics scripts (PostHog, Cloudflare) - expected and not critical
